entities.name: AFLATOXIN CONTAMINATION
entities.description: A quality problem occurring at various stages of groundnut production, from growth to transportation, that impacts export quality

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The agricultural crop subject to aflatoxin contamination and exported from Malawi

entities.name: ECONOMIC ANALYSIS
entities.description: The research approach used to determine the financial impact of aflatoxin contamination on exports and trade balance

entities.name: EXPORTS
entities.description: The commercial shipment of groundnuts from Malawi to international markets

entities.name: TRADE BALANCE
entities.description: The economic metric representing the difference between the value of a country's exports and imports

entities.name: MALAWI
entities.description: The country where the groundnut production and economic analysis of aflatoxin impact took place

entities.name: EXPORT LOSSES
entities.description: The financial deficit in groundnut trade resulting from aflatoxin contamination
